action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 28 achieved a new best of 89.79% average accuracy with an ensemble of k-NN and a linear head on frozen IN21k ViT features, using original+flip training features (90k) and TTA. Analysis: The buffer currently discards ~75% of training data by keeping only two views per image. Since the backbone is frozen, we can cheaply densify the buffer with more augmented views (random crop + flip) to improve both k-NN coverage and linear head training. Adding 2 extra augmented views (4x total) increases the buffer to ~180k feature vectors (~550 MB) but extraction time remains under 2 minutes. This should boost k-NN accuracy and give the linear head more diverse data, potentially pushing the ensemble past 90%. To limit risk, I will back up the old best checkpoint/configs, run the augmented pipeline, compare the new ensemble validation accuracy to the old 0.8946, and restore the old checkpoint if the new one is worse before submitting. Decision: Rewrite train.py to cache 4 views per image (orig, flip, 2x random crop+flip) using kornia, rewrite train_head.py to add mixup regularization, then run backup -> train -> tune k -> train head -> conditional restore -> offline verify -> submit eval.
action.command: cp checkpoints/model.pt checkpoints/model_best.pt && cp checkpoints/ensemble_config.json checkpoints/ensemble_config_best.json && cp checkpoints/knn_config.json checkpoints/knn_config_best.json && cp checkpoints/linear_head.pt checkpoints/linear_head_best.pt && python train.py && python tune_k.py && python train_head.py && python -c "import json, shutil; new=json.load(open('checkpoints/ensemble_config.json')); old=json.load(open('checkpoints/ensemble_config_best.json')); print('new_val_acc:',new['ensemble_val_acc'],'old_val_acc:',old['ensemble_val_acc']); assert new['ensemble_val_acc']>0.0" && python -c "import json, shutil, os; new=json.load(open('checkpoints/ensemble_config.json')); old=json.load(open('checkpoints/ensemble_config_best.json')); [shutil.copy(f'checkpoints/{n}_best.json',f'checkpoints/{n}.json') for n in ['ensemble_config','knn_config']] or shutil.copy('checkpoints/model_best.pt','checkpoints/model.pt') or shutil.copy('checkpoints/linear_head_best.pt','checkpoints/linear_head.pt') if new['ensemble_val_acc'] <= old['ensemble_val_acc'] else None; print('Kept new' if new['ensemble_val_acc'] > old['ensemble_val_acc'] else 'Restored old')" && mkdir -p /tmp/dummy_test && python -c "import torch,os; vd=torch.load(os.path.join(os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR','/data'),'val.pt')); torch.save({'images':vd['images'][:100]},'/tmp/dummy_test/test.pt')" && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/dummy_test --checkpoint checkpoints/model.pt --output /tmp/dummy_out.json && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/dummy_out.json')); assert len(d['predictions'])==100; print('predict.py OK, predictions:',d['predictions'][:10])"
